title: Online course with promise-of-result risk (ES)
rationale: Spanish-language formation/coaching offer where the user implies guaranteed financial outcomes. Mock-mode runner asserts caps and missing-info; real-mode is expected to populate risky_claims_detected.
notes: Tests ES locale + course offer type + risky financial claims detection (real-mode goal).

input.raw_offer_text: Programa de formación online: aprende a generar 10.000€/mes desde casa en 90 días. Garantizado o te devolvemos el dinero.
input.target_customer: Adultos hispanohablantes que buscan trabajo en remoto

must_pass: [real-mode] identification.offer_type == 'course' (mock heuristic does not catch Spanish 'formación', deferred to real model)
